title: Expanding School Counseling: The Impacts of California Funding Changes
summary_en: We use panel-based estimators to show that California’s Supplemental School Counseling Program increased the number of counselors on staff and improved counselor to student ratios, but reduced average counselor experience.
title_cn: 扩大学校心理咨询服务供给：加州拨款政策调整影响研究报告正式发布

title: AI Implications for Chemical, Biological, Radiological, and Nuclear Defense Policy and Programs: A Strategic Analytic Research Agenda
summary_en: Artificial intelligence is reshaping chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear deterrence, posing new risks and opportunities. This paper outlines a roadmap to guide research and policy on challenges amid rising global technological rivalry.
title_cn: 人工智能对化学、生物、放射性与核防御政策及项目的影响：一项战略分析研究议程

title: Could Deep Sea Mining Break China's Grip on Critical Minerals?
summary_en: What look like seabed rocks are polymetallic nodules, rich in the minerals that drive modern economies. They could help break U.S. reliance on China, which controls the market. But nobody has ever mined seabed nodules at scale, much less processed them for industrial use.
title_cn: 深海采矿能否打破中国对关键矿产的掌控？
